ServiceBusToolset.CLI 1.0.0+85f216cd46be13f25d97761af6b6ab791ed31ef2
Copyright (C) 2026 Gagik Kyurkchyan

  dump-dlq                 Export DLQ messages to a JSON file

  purge-dlq                Purge messages from a dead letter queue

  resubmit-dlq             Resubmit messages from a dead letter queue back to
                           the main queue

  diagnose-dlq             Diagnose DLQ messages by correlating with Application
                           Insights telemetry

  monitor-queues           Monitor Service Bus queue statistics in a
                           live-updating console table

  monitor-subscriptions    Monitor Service Bus topic subscription statistics in
                           a live-updating console table

  help                     Display more information on a specific command.

  version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
ServiceBusToolset.CLI 1.0.0+85f216cd46be13f25d97761af6b6ab791ed31ef2
Copyright (C) 2026 Gagik Kyurkchyan

  -n, --namespace       Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
                        mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

  -q, --queue           Queue name

  -t, --topic           Topic name

  -s, --subscription    Subscription name

  -a, --app-insights    Required. Application Insights resource ID (e.g.,
                        /subscriptions/.../resourceGroups/.../providers/microsof
                        t.insights/components/...)

  -o, --output          Output JSON file path (optional, prints to console if
                        not specified)

  --before              Only include messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
                        (ISO 8601 format)

  --max-messages        (Default: 1000) Maximum number of messages to diagnose

  -i, --interactive     (Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
                        select which to diagnose

  --merge-similar       (Default: false) Merge similar DLQ categories using
                        LCS-based clustering (interactive mode only)

  --categorize-by       Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
                        back to application properties), $Prop for body.
                        Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

  -v, --verbose         (Default: false) Enable verbose output

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

result.stderr:
ServiceBusToolset.CLI 1.0.0+85f216cd46be13f25d97761af6b6ab791ed31ef2
Copyright (C) 2026 Gagik Kyurkchyan

  -n, --namespace       Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
                        mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

  -q, --queue           Queue name

  -t, --topic           Topic name

  -s, --subscription    Subscription name

  --before              Only resubmit messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
                        (ISO 8601 format)

  --dry-run             (Default: false) Preview message count without
                        resubmitting

  -v, --verbose         (Default: false) Enable verbose output

  -i, --interactive     (Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
                        select which to resubmit

  --target-queue        Target queue to resubmit messages to (defaults to source
                        queue)

  --target-topic        Target topic to resubmit messages to (defaults to source
                        topic)

  --merge-similar       (Default: false) Merge similar categories by replacing
                        parameterized values (GUIDs, numbers) with wildcards

  --categorize-by       Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
                        back to application properties), $Prop for body.
                        Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

ServiceBusToolset.CLI 1.0.0+85f216cd46be13f25d97761af6b6ab791ed31ef2
Copyright (C) 2026 Gagik Kyurkchyan

  -n, --namespace       Required. Fully qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g.,
                        mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net)

  -q, --queue           Queue name

  -t, --topic           Topic name

  -s, --subscription    Subscription name

  --before              Only resubmit messages enqueued before this UTC datetime
                        (ISO 8601 format)

  --dry-run             (Default: false) Preview message count without
                        resubmitting

  -v, --verbose         (Default: false) Enable verbose output

  -i, --interactive     (Default: false) Interactive mode: show categories and
                        select which to resubmit

  --target-queue        Target queue to resubmit messages to (defaults to source
                        queue)

  --target-topic        Target topic to resubmit messages to (defaults to source
                        topic)

  --merge-similar       (Default: false) Merge similar categories by replacing
                        parameterized values (GUIDs, numbers) with wildcards

  --categorize-by       Properties to categorize by. #Prop for system (falls
                        back to application properties), $Prop for body.
                        Default: #Subject,#DeadLetterReason

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.
